description.from: Heals 4 allies with lowest HP 10% of Max HP, and heals extra ??? HP over 8 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.
description.to: Restores HP of the 4 allies with the lowest HP by 10% of Max HP, and additionally restores 100*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 16.1% ATK HP every 1sec for 10sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.from: Dispels all negative effects. M.DEF is increased by ??? for 20 sec.
description.to: Removes all negative effects from all allies and increases their M.DEF by 101*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) for 15sec.

description.from: Deals a total of ??? M.DMG over 10 attacks to enemies within range. Hit enemies' ATK Spd is reduced by 25%.
description.to: Deals 88*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+55.8% ATK Magic DMG to enemies within range 10 time, and reduces their ATK Spd by 10% for 10sec.

description.from: Every 7 sec, an ally with the lowest Hp recovers 1 orb of mana and ??? HP.
description.to: Every 8sec, restores 1000 Mana and 2208*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 358.4% ATK HP to 1 ally with the lowest HP.

IV.from: Mana Recovery per sec of the target is increased by 50%.
IV.to: Increases Mana Recovery per sec of the target by 15%.

IV.from: CC Resist is increased by 250 for 20 sec.
IV.to: Increases CC Resist by 120 for 15 sec.

IV.from: All DMG the target takes is increased by 25%.

light.from: Mana Cost is increased by 1 and skill effect range changes to all allies.
light.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, and the effect now applies to all allies.

light.from: Each hit removes 250 mana from the target.
light.to: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10%.

dark.from: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, Silence enemies in range for 1 sec.
dark.to: Increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 10%.

dark.from: Also supplies 1 orb of mana to the ally with the highest ATK.
dark.to: Additionally restores 500 Mana to the 2 allies with the highest Attack.

description.from: [Soulrush] Mana cost is reduced by 1 and heals all allies' HP by {0}% of DMG.
description.to: [Soulrush] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and heals all allies' HP by {0}% of DMG.

dark.from: Upon attacking, there is a 10% chance to reduce all DEF of the target by 20% and reduce all the hero's cooldowns by 5%.
dark.to: All allies’ Mana recovery per second increases by 30%, and your cooldown of all skills is reduced by 5%.

description.from: Every 20 sec, an ally with the lowest HP turns invisible for {0} sec. An invisible ally becomes immune to P.DMG, and HP will not drop below 1%. MP Recovery per sec is increased to {1}%.
description.to: Every 20 sec, puts the 2 allies with the lowest HP into Spirit Form for {0} sec. Allies in Spirit Form are immune to physical attacks, their HP cannot be reduced below 1%, and their Mana recovery per second increases by 35%.

description.from: Summons the soul of God's Lamp, Kurulati for 10 sec, increasing all allies' ATK Spd by 300 and Mana recovery per sec by 100%, inflicts hallucination upon one random enemy every 3 sec, reducing their ACC by 350 for 3 sec.
description.to: Summons the soul of God’s Lamp, Kurulati for 10sec, increasing all allies’ ATK SPD by {2} and Mana Recovery by 15%. Afterward, every 3sec, inflicts Hallucination on a random enemy, reducing ACC by 350 for 3sec.

2.from: Upon activation, immediately activates the invisibility effect of God's Lamp, Kurulati on 2 allies.
2.to: Upon activation, immediately activates the invisibility effect of God's Lamp, Kurulati on {1} allies.
